name: Harman International Industries, Inc.
description: Harman International Industries, Inc. designs and engineers connected products and solutions for automakers, consumers, and enterprises worldwide, including connected car systems, audio and visual products, enterprise automation solutions, and services supporting the Internet of Things. With leading brands such as AKG, Harman Kardon, Infinity, JBL, Lexicon, Mark Levinson, and Revel, the company is a wholly-owned subsidiary of Samsung Electronics Co., Ltd.
